title: Transferability
doc_html:
§307.5.  Transferability

Transport licenses are freely transferable between vehicles, but the licensee remains responsible for all activities taking place under authority of that license.  

Acts 1986, No. 904, §1.  

{{NOTE:  SEE ACTS 1986, NO. 904, §5.}}
